bound: For support S with N_S shell blocks, A_S(x) <= N_S (||x||_2^2/w)^(w/2). This proves the target whenever N_S <= A_w(1)(w/24)^(w/2).
claim: Applies a rigorous AM-GM edge-count bound to every support face of the Act-visible shell-domination problem for w=12,16, certifying all small and medium supports and isolating only high-support boundary faces.
claim_boundary: This is a sufficient boundary sieve, not a complete proof for the remaining high-support faces.
